## Checklist

- [ ] I ran tests locally (`pytest -q tests`)
- [ ] I ran lint locally (`ruff check app tests scripts`)
- [ ] I verified key API endpoints manually (`/docs` or `/playground`)
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed

## Validation Evidence

- Test output:
  - Paste key lines (or screenshots)
- API checks:
  - Mention endpoints and expected/actual behavior
